name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the course
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Describe the bug clearly

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Bash Version: [e.g., 5.1.16]

## Stack Number
Stack #XX (if related to specific lesson)

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched for similar issues
- [ ] I verified the bug exists in the latest version
